title: aleuritia maximowiczii
intro: Aleuritia maximowiczii, also known as the Chinese angelica tree, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to China and Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving circulation, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-viral properties. Aleuritia maximowiczii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
